en: Speaking up and sharing your ideas in meetings
zh: 在会议上开口、分享自己的想法
tip_en: Write down one idea before the meeting and say it early.
tip_zh: 开会前先写下一个想法，早点说出来。

tip_en: Keep a short list of your wins so you can mention them naturally.
tip_zh: 列一份简短的成果清单，这样你可以自然地提起。

tip_en: Start simple — ask about their weekend or the weather.
tip_zh: 从简单的开始——问问他们的周末或天气。

en: Asking questions when something is unclear
tip_en: Try: "Can you help me understand this?" Asking shows you care.
tip_zh: 试试：“可以帮我理解一下这个吗？” 提问说明你很用心。

zh: 礼貌地表达不同意见或拒绝
tip_en: You can say: "I see it a little differently — can I share?"
tip_zh: 你可以说：“我的看法有点不同——我可以说说吗？”

tip_en: Reach out to one person a week. A short hello is enough.
tip_zh: 每周联系一个人。一句简单的问候就够了。
